extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won from Alpecin-Fenix leadout after UAE and BikeExchange trains burned out, GROENEWEGEN and BENNETT badly out of position.
tactical_patterns: UAE and BikeExchange led early sprint organization but lacked depth to hold position through final kilometer chaos.
Alpecin-Fenix deliberately stayed patient while rivals exhausted leadouts, striking late with fresh Philipsen train.
Bennett positioned at rear with entire team suggests Bora deliberately avoiding early positioning battles on arrow-straight 60km run-in.

rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: finished extraordinarily strongly from terrible position, knee injury concerns seemingly resolved
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: had Alpecin-Fenix leadout but lost Philipsen's wheel at barriers, suggests positioning panic rather than form issue
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: UAE built entire train for home race debut but Ackermann faded badly when Philipsen launched
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: just fading mentioned separately from positioning problems implies leg speed deficit not tactical error
rider_signals.STRAKHOV Dmitry: neutral: Gazprom rider took both intermediate sprints from break to secure bonus seconds for GC placement
